title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, works in Node and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, bringing LangChain abstractions to local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI client for Ollama, supports code highlighting, RAG, multimodal chats.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama, providing async and sync APIs to interact with local LLMs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama, allowing Ruby developers to run and chat with local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama local models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Kubernetes Helm chart to deploy Ollama with optional GPU support and web UI.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code and documentation using Ollama models directly in the editor.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that connects to Ollama, showcasing local LLM interaction with UI.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and compose examples for running Ollama in containers with GPU.

title: ollama-kt
summary: Kotlin multiplatform client for Ollama, targeting JVM and Android.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation example using Ollama and Chroma for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Simple React chat frontend that talks to Ollama via its OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial Go client library for Ollama, providing idiomatic Go APIs and streaming support.

title: ollama-ansible
summary: Ansible role to install and configure Ollama on Ubuntu/Debian servers with systemd.
